title: Sarah Ferguson and the Call to Share What She Knows
summary: Sarah Ferguson is a former duchess who has not been seen in public for a while. People are talking about her because some lawmakers in the United States want her to tell what she knows about Jeffrey Epstein, a man who did bad things. These lawmakers are part of a group that is looking into how Epstein's case was handled. They say Ferguson might have information that can help. She is not being forced to speak, but they hope she will agree to answer questions under oath. Other people, like a congresswoman and the family of someone who accused Epstein, also think she should share what she knows. There are rumors that TV networks might pay her for an interview, but it's unclear if she will do it. Ferguson's team has not said anything about this.

a promise to tell the truth, often made in court or to a committee
facts or details about something that can help in an investigation

background_read: Sarah Ferguson was married to Prince Andrew, a member of the British royal family. Jeffrey Epstein was a wealthy man who was accused of hurting many people, and he died in jail. Lawmakers in the U.S. are trying to find out more about what happened with Epstein to help the people he hurt. They want anyone who knows something to come forward and tell the truth.
Article_Structure: WHO: Sarah Ferguson, a former duchess, and U.S. lawmakers like Congressman Suhas Subramanyam.
WHAT: Calls for Ferguson to give evidence about Jeffrey Epstein under oath.
WHERE: In the United States, where lawmakers are investigating.
WHY: To help find justice for survivors of Epstein's actions by gathering information.

perspectives.description: They believe Ferguson has important information and should testify to help the investigation.
